context: Tests whether the agent respects Dawn schema range step constraints: padding_top and padding_bottom must be multiples of 4; card_shadow_blur must be a multiple of 5 (if used); page_width must be a multiple of 100 (if used); buttons_radius step is 2 (if used). Off-step values cause theme validation failures.

checklist.name: padding_top multiples of 4 (all sections)
checklist.description: Every padding_top value present in templates/index.json is a multiple of 4 (e.g., 0, 4, 8, 16, 24, 32, 40, 48, 56, 64 — NOT 10, 15, 30, 50, 60, 100)

checklist.name: padding_bottom multiples of 4 (all sections)
checklist.description: Every padding_bottom value present in templates/index.json is a multiple of 4 (e.g., 0, 4, 8, 16, 24, 32, 40, 48, 56, 64 — NOT 10, 15, 30, 50, 60, 100)

checklist.name: No step-1 padding values
checklist.description: Common invalid padding values (10, 15, 20, 30, 50, 60, 100) do NOT appear as padding_top or padding_bottom in templates/index.json

checklist.name: card_shadow_blur step 5 (if used)
checklist.description: If card_shadow_blur appears in templates/index.json, its value is a multiple of 5 (e.g., 0, 5, 10, 15, 20 — NOT 8, 12, 18)

checklist.name: page_width step 100 (if used)
checklist.description: If page_width appears in templates/index.json, its value is a multiple of 100 (e.g., 1100, 1200, 1300 — NOT 1150, 1280, 1440)

checklist.name: buttons_radius step 2 (if used)
checklist.description: If buttons_radius appears in templates/index.json, its value is a multiple of 2 (e.g., 0, 2, 4, 6, 8 — NOT 3, 5, 7)

checklist.name: Explicit padding on hero section
checklist.description: The hero (image-banner) section in templates/index.json has explicit padding_top and padding_bottom values set

checklist.name: Explicit padding on tiers section
checklist.description: The tier picker (multicolumn) section in templates/index.json has explicit padding_top and padding_bottom values set

checklist.name: Explicit padding on FAQ section
checklist.description: The FAQ (collapsible-content) section in templates/index.json has explicit padding_top and padding_bottom values set

checklist.name: Full homepage structure
checklist.description: templates/index.json contains all expected sections: image-banner hero, custom-liquid anchors, how-it-works multicolumn, tiers multicolumn, collage recent drops, testimonials multicolumn, collapsible-content FAQ, newsletter email capture

checklist.name: Valid JSON
checklist.description: templates/index.json is valid JSON that can be parsed without errors
